summary: Iteration 72: Offline Order Flow via Operations Bot - All features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Bot 'order' command, firm selection, customer search, and conversational flow all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/bot/search-products-with-stock correctly returns products with stock, available serials, and default warranty years
POST /api/bot/create-offline-order creates sales_order and pending_fulfillment entries correctly
Default warranty years calculation works: inverter=2, battery=5, stabilizer=3 (based on product name matching)
Bot 'order' command correctly starts the offline order flow with firm selection
Customer search and creation flow works via /api/bot/search-parties and /api/bot/create-party
Order confirmation creates proper pending_fulfillment entry with status 'pending_dispatch'
Serial number reservation works for manufactured items
seed_data_creation: Test customers and orders created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified the new Offline Order conversational flow via Operations Bot. Key features tested: 1) Bot 'order' command starts flow at /api/bot/firms, 2) /api/bot/search-products-with-stock returns products with stock and available serials, 3) /api/bot/create-offline-order creates sales_order and pending_fulfillment entries, 4) Default warranty years: inverter=2, battery=5, stabilizer=3, 5) Customer search/create via /api/bot/search-parties and /api/bot/create-party. Test firms: MuscleGrid Pvt Ltd, MuscleGrid Energy Solutions, Electronics Bay.

bot_order_command.details: Bot 'order' command starts offline order flow with firm selection

search_products_with_stock.details: Returns products with current stock, available serials, and default warranty years

create_offline_order.details: Creates sales_order and pending_fulfillment entries correctly

default_warranty_years.details: Correctly calculates warranty: inverter=2, battery=5, stabilizer=3 years

customer_search_flow.details: Customer search and creation works via bot

pending_fulfillment_creation.details: Order confirmation creates pending_fulfillment entry with status 'pending_dispatch'

serial_number_reservation.details: Serial numbers are reserved for manufactured items in orders

payment_status_handling.details: Supports paid, partial, and credit payment statuses

delivery_method_handling.details: Supports self_pickup, courier, and company_delivery methods
